title: Smoky Thai Larb
description: A spicy, sour, and sweet take on the classic Thai dish, with a smoky twist from the use of chipotle peppers.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine chipotle peppers, garlic, and 1 tablespoon of fish sauce. Blend until smooth.
2. In a large pan or wok, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the blended chipotle mixture to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the ground meat to the pan and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
5. Add the palm sugar, fish sauce, lime juice, and rice vinegar to the pan and stir to combine.
6. Add the Thai red chili peppers to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the fresh cilantro and mint leaves.
8. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
9. Serve the larb hot, garnished with additional cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
10. Serve with steamed rice or noodles if desired.
